articles.title: FROM “SHARK TANK” TO SMART HOME STARDOM
articles.summary: Venture capitalists know how difficult it is to spot PROMISING EARLY INVESTMENT OPPORTUNITIES, and the story of Ring doorbells is the perfect example. Even the all-knowing Sharks from _Shark Tank _declined the offer to buy 10% of Ring for $700,000, and now the company has blown up, all thanks to retail distribution. Next, let's turn our attention to RYSE: the brand set to follow a similar trajectory. The founder PITCHED ON CANADA'S VERSION OF _SHARK TANK, DRAGONS' DEN_, received two offers [3], and now their patented tech is currently sold in over 100 Best Buy stores.

articles.title: Follow the Dragons' lead and become an early investor in RYSE
COHERE LAUNCHES NEW RERANK 3 MODEL
articles.summary: Cohere has released its newest foundation model, Rerank 3, purpose-built to enhance enterprise search and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. The model is compatible with any database or search index and can also be plugged into any legacy application with native search capabilities. Rerank 3 can boost search performance or reduce the cost of running RAG applications with negligible impact on latency with a single line of code.

articles.title: META BROADENS LABELING OF AI CONTENT
articles.summary: Meta is expanding its "Made with AI" labeling to cover a broader range of AI-generated content starting in May in response to the evolving landscape of manipulated media. Labels will be applied through various means, including user disclosure and detection of AI-made content. The policy update follows recommendations from Meta's independent Oversight Board.

articles.title: MISTRAL'S NEW MODEL
articles.summary: Mistral has released a new 8x22B model via magnet link. The first version of benchmarks from the community show it performs admirably as a base model with 77 MMLU (commonly associated with reasoning).

articles.title: ENHANCED GEOMETRIC DETAIL IN STEREO MATCHING
articles.summary: The Motif Channel Attention Stereo Matching Network (MoCha-Stereo) is a novel approach that preserves geometric structures often lost in traditional stereo matching methods.

articles.title: POINT CLOUD COMPRESSION
articles.summary: PoLoPCAC is a method for lossless point cloud attribute compression that marries high efficiency with strong adaptability across varying scales and densities of point clouds.

articles.title: MULTI-CAMERA 3D OBJECT DETECTION
articles.summary: This study introduces a weak-to-strong eliciting framework to improve surround refinement in Multi-Camera 3D Object Detection (MC3D-Det), a field enhanced by bird's-eye view technologies.

articles.title: USING AMAZON BEDROCK AND CONFLUENT TO BUILD A GENAI CHATBOT WITH ACCESS TO REAL-TIME DATA
articles.summary: Learn how to build a virtual banking chatbot [11] that answers user questions based on real-time data. This demo uses Amazon Bedrock to power the chatbot with any GenAI model (in this case Claude by Anthropic), and Confluent Cloud [12] to make real-time data available

articles.title: TRANSFORMING IMAGES INTO 3D MESHES IN SECONDS
articles.summary: This project unveils InstantMesh, a framework that generates 3D meshes from a single image instantly, boasting unmatched quality and scalability.

articles.title: EXPLORING CONCEPT LEARNING
articles.summary: A recent study investigated how different concepts are understood by various layers within large language models. It found that simpler tasks are handled by earlier layers while more complex ones require deeper processing.

articles.title: ANOMALY DETECTION IN 3D OBJECTS
articles.summary: SplatPose addresses the challenge of anomaly detection in 3D objects from various poses with a novel approach that uses 3D Gaussian splatting.

articles.title: WAYMO SELF-DRIVING CARS ARE DELIVERING UBEREATS ORDERS FOR FIRST TIME
articles.summary: UberEats customers in the Phoenix metropolitan area will receive some food deliveries via Waymo's Jaguar I-PACE electric vehicles.

articles.title: THE STATE OF GENERATIVE AI, 2024
articles.summary: The generative AI industry looks like it is facing many issues, but there is still a lot of hype. Many people have found a use case for the technology and are using it. Research continues to push the field further at a fast pace.

articles.title: JETMOE - LLAMA 2 PERFORMANCE FOR $100K
articles.summary: This mixture-of-experts model was trained using public datasets on a reasonable amount of compute. It matches the performance of the much larger and more expensive Llama 2 7B model from Meta.

articles.title: SPOTIFY LAUNCHES PERSONALIZED AI PLAYLISTS
articles.summary: Spotify has introduced AI playlists, a new feature that allows users to generate personalized playlists based on written prompts.

articles.title: BUTTERNUT AI (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: Build your dream website in 20 seconds with AI.

articles.title: WHO IS WINNING THE AI TALENT WARS?
articles.summary: Microsoft is currently ahead of the competition in the AI talent wars.
